card_description: St. Teresa of Avila is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies his 1974 experience as the "Second Advent," occurring pluralistically within individual minds rather than in a single visible man."
